title: cyanus lanigerus
intro: Cyanus lanigerus, also known as woolly cornflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Cyanus lanigerus include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Cyanus lanigerus can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
